column1: Which season do you like___________: summer or winter? (GOOD)
"Nobody wants to play with me" she said__________ . (SAD)
Nobody wanted to play with her. She felt________ . (SAD)
She looked at us________and did not say a word. (SAD)
Torosaurus had the____________head of any land animal that has ever lived. _______head was as_______as a modern car. (LARGE/IT/LONG)
Towards the end of their_________, stars swell up and become much as 100 times__________ . (BIG)
You had a party yesterday, didn't you? Did you enjoy__________? - Yes, we did. (YOU)
